post.body:
I dont think im very stereotypically masculine... 

I feel that I have quite a few not-so-masculine qualities (not physical, obviously). Its kinda buggin me... 

On a lighter note, I got really stoned last night and watched Black Books series 2 - I havent laughed so much in a long time!

comments.body: It's so funny because i know very few masculine hetrosexual guys.
comments.author: ex_14th112
